input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(119, 142, 85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(29, 29, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(64, 64, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(37, 37, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(31, 31, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
